code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test26-JUN-2020Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine and chloride, low serum glucose, and significant proteinuria with glucosuria and ketonuria. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity. These findings suggest impaired renal function (possible acute or chronic kidney disease) with evidence of renal glycosuria and proteinuria. No signs of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for possible diabetes or other metabolic disturbances.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
